title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
